case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. NICOLAS DELGADILLO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT: 1. DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( CCP 585) 2. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS ( CCP 1033) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELGADILLO, NICOLAS $3,551.96 PRINCIPAL, $262.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,814.46, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADILLO, NICOLAS DOES 1-15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-24-2009
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 16314008): PIERCE, EMILY SUBSTITUTED FOR PATENAUDE, RAYMOND A. AS ATTORNEY FOR PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED MAR-01-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADILLO, NICOLAS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $262.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADILLO, NICOLAS
WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-15, INCLUSIVE
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100048965) FILED BY ATTORNEY PIERCE, EMILY
